subject: Ambrook Full Service for your Stocker Operation
intro_text:
Hi {{ contact.firstname }},

Tommy here from Ambrook. Wanted to touch base as it looks like you’ve got a complex stocker operation that might need an additional set of eyes.

You might be a great fit for our Full Service plan.

Full Service pairs you with a dedicated Account Manager who will work with you 1-on-1 over the course of several months to save you time behind the computer, make sense of your books, and drive informed business decisions such as:

  • A clear view of cost per pound of gain by pen and feeding program
  • Cash flow projections so you can plan your next purchase with confidence
  • Retain vs. sell analysis to maximize every decision
secondary_text:
Or if you’d like to give me a call, you can reach me at (303)- 276-2423. Looking forward to hearing from you.

Hope the cattle are gaining well,
Tommy King
Ambrook Full Service

P.S. Your project and enterprise-level categories are a great place to start to track your profitability per pen and have a complete grasp on your cost and gain per group.
